feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Enable Automatic Attachments for Output Items.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings!!

As we have a one of the upgrade items in 2308, Output Management: Enable Automatic Attachments for Output Items. (Output Management: Enable Automatic Attachments for Output Items | SAP Help Portal)

The question here is if we have enabled this feature, will users have the option to Print with attachments and/or print without attachments? 

If the option is available, please let us know how we can manage it. Please provide if you have any document for the same.

@Ravish SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management 

Thanks in Advance!

 

Regards,

Yaswanth.

entry.title: Why the Account assignment category not M and showing E
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I just ran an MRP process for a bought-out item, and purchase requisitions were generated against the sales orders. However, some purchase requisition account assignment categories are showing as "E".

I need to create a purchase order for a sale order against the stock. The mentioned purchase request (E)  cannot be created against the sale order.

entry.title: Reconciliation Accounts Payable after Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation
entry.content:
Hi!

My customer are running Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation in S/4 Hana Public Cloud which applies to there Open items within the Accounts Payable. After the currency valuation is done they want to reconcile the AP-account for monthly closings. Which report should they use that includes the valuation aswell?

We've tried Manage Supplier Line items, however the valutation is not applied into that report. We've also tried Display Line items in General ledger, where we can find the currency effect however this report does not includes for exampel invoice reference.  

Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: SAP S/4hana Cloud Public, BADIs with developers extensibility for service contracts
entry.content:
Hello, In the public edition of S/4Hana Cloud, we need to make enhancement deployments for the service contracts (CRMS4_SERV_H/CRMS4_SERV_I).

The BADIS CRMS4_SERV_CUST_H_MODIFY, CRMS4_SERV_CUST_I_MODIFY and CRMS4_SERV_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE apply to service contracts but the API status there is only for USE_IN_KEY_USER_APPS.

Let's need to use developer extensibility. Is there any badi published for developers' extensibility in this context?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Bottom Up Scheduling in S/4 Hana cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Do we have this functionality i.e., from Raw material delivered date Planned order start date should be proposed.

Scenario :-  The scheduled delivery date for the customer's FG is set for February 18, 2024. However, when we ran the MRP, it generated a planned order start date of February 16, 2024. Unfortunately, the required raw materials expected to arrival is on February 19, 2024. Therefore, in order to account for the availability of the raw materials, the MRP run should propose a planned order start date of either February 19th or 20th, 2024.

Is this doable in S/4 Hana cloud Public edition?

entry.title: Seeking Guidance on Updating JSON Payload for Edocuments with Custom Fields in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurus,

I hope this message finds you well. I am currently working on a project that involves integrating eDocuments in SAP Public Cloud, and I am facing a challenge in updating the JSON payload with custom fields. I am reaching out to the community in the hope that someone can provide insights, guidance, or best practices in dealing with this specific scenario.

The objective is to enhance the eDocuments functionality by incorporating custom fields within the JSON payload. I have reviewed the available documentation, but I am seeking practical advice from members of the community who may have successfully implemented a similar customization.

Key points of my inquiry:

1. JSON Payload Structure: I am looking for guidance on how to structure the JSON payload to include custom fields seamlessly without causing any disruptions to the standard eDocuments functionality.

2. Best Practices: Are there any best practices, tips, or recommendations when it comes to updating JSON payloads for eDocuments in SAP Public Cloud? Any advice on avoiding potential pitfalls or common mistakes would be invaluable.

3. Documentation and Resources: If there are specific documentation, blogs, or resources that address this customization, please point me in the right direction. I want to make sure I am leveraging the most up-to-date and relevant information.

*Note: I have created a custom field within the Document Compliance business scenario and implemented custom logic using the available BAdI for Document Compliance. The value is populating in the eDocument Cockpit, but it's not updating in the JSON payload when checked

Thank you in advance for any assistance you can provide. I am eager to learn from your experiences and insights.

Kind regards,

Sobhagya Thapa

entry.title: How to input manual iitem price in apps Create Sales Order
entry.content:
Is there any way to input manual item price when creating sales order through Fiori Create Sales Order apps? With VA01 I can input manual item price, but with create sales order apps, there is no field to input item price.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management : Provision Posting
entry.content:
Hi,

There is plan cost/revenue can be uploaded to project. 
Example:

Planned Revenue :  $ 150,000    ;   Planned Cost : $ 100,000

The project started with POC. However, when the project started half way, total cost was overspent. The expected cost will increase to $150,000. Project Manager plan to update the expected cost to $200,000

What is the best practice to handle this scenario? How to post provision of lost amount?

 

thank you.

entry.title: Tax statement item missing for tax code
entry.content:
When posting a Billing Document receiving an error message "Document 90000xxx: Tax statement item missing for tax code O0".

What steps need to be taken to for resolution.

Thanks in advance.

Chempian Pontie

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud: Stock Transfer Order (STO)
entry.content:
Hi,

My colleague has a question: why does Stock Transfer Order (STO) in public cloud before approval show as demand in Stock/Requirements list of the supplying plant? Thank you.

Regards,

Juan

entry.title: Destinaiton storage BIN for outbound delivery
entry.content:
HI Expert,

we have an requirement that while posting outbound delivery we need to pick item from specific BIN (Source BIN) and directly post goods issue, we dont want to move this into destination BIN. in system every outbound while creating picking warehosue task i have to define staging Bay which i want to ignore. i want to deliver the goods from direct BIN. 

here its trying to move source to destination BIN then post goods issue, here how i can maintian source BIN manually and destination will be like delivery id.

entry.title: Intelligent product proposal Functionality - Adjustment
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I would like to understand is there any way we can set the parameter in the Intelligent product proposal Functionality in S/4 Hana public cloud. It proposes the products based on the History, Listed Materials, CMIR etc. but does it possible to set a range on picking the products based on History of sales data (Ex-Last 6 months order history)? Can we control something similar in public cloud?

Regards,

Rajeev

entry.title: Migration of transactional data for fixed assets
entry.content:
Dear experts,

During the migration of fixed assets transactional data, we obtain the following results in the simulation:

Asset 000082000001 0000 not in company code 3910

This message is shown for both depreciation areas /ledger!

Please note the attached information!

Do you have any idea?

Thanks for you support!

BR Jan

entry.title: Is it possible to modify the data of recurring supplier invoices to be posted?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using the app F4312 recurring supplier invoice, to register the utility invoices that arrive every month, but it is necessary to change some data before the invoice is posted, for example the supplier invoice number (Reference), the value, among others.

When executing, the system creates the supplier invoice and immediately posts it, but it does not allow me to visualize the invoice before it is posted in order to change the data. I am trying to do is that only the invoice of the month is created, but it is not posted.

Is this what I am trying to do possible, or am I going about the process incorrectly?

Thanks in advanc

entry.title: Reprint Sales Contract with updated data
entry.content: Can we re print sales contract output with the updated sales contract data? If there is a miss typed quantity in sales contract and the sales contract already saved, then I want to change the quantity and re print it.

entry.title: s/4hana public cloud work center hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi, Folks , 

do you know how to create work center hierarchy in s4hpc?

 

thanks

entry.title: Add field in purchase order email notification
entry.content: # 0062597539 We use the function that email notification in purchase order flexiable workflow , details are as follows Email template: MMPUR_PO_WFL_DEADLINE_EMAIL Language: Chinese So, we have a business requirement is to add these filed in body HTML, but it can't add these following fields we want in standard template Item Product;Item Product describtion; Item quantity; Item unit ; Item net price ;Item delivery date ;payment term Is there any enhancement or configuration to add these fields?

entry.title: SQVI in S/4 Public edition
entry.content:
Hello seniors!

How can I find the s/4 pce version of sqvi?

Thanks in advance

huny

entry.title: Scope items 1J2 vs 5XU difference
entry.content:
Hello, I'm trying to search for an accurate description of functionalities for scope items 1J2 and 5XU but apart from the basic business benefits I don't really see the list of functionalities anywhere. Maybe someone will know:

What functionalities can I use when 1J2 is activated?

And what can I do when 5XU is activated (but could not do with just 1J2)?

Thanks!

entry.title: Error in creating BP Customer via API
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we are trying to create a new customer throught API:

PATCH https://xx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_Customer(Customer='CC0010') 

We have already created the BP general's data (Business Partner(Gen.) 000000) with the API:

POST https://xxx-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner 

but we get the following error:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
    <code>/IWBEP/CM_MGW_RT/020</code>
    <message xml:lang="en">Resource not found for segment 'A_CustomerType'</message>
    <innererror>
        <application>
            <component_id>LO-MD-BP</component_id>
            <service_namespace>/SAP/</service_namespace>
            <service_id>API_BUSINESS_PARTNER</service_id>
            <service_version>0001</service_version>
        </application>
        <transactionid>63B568C79CA901E0E0065D41A20679BB</transactionid>
        <timestamp>20240220092427.0382470</timestamp>
        <Error_Resolution>
            <SAP_Transaction>For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader "SAP Gateway Error Log" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details</SAP_Transaction>
            <SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
        </Error_Resolution>
        <longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_CustomerType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
        <errordetails>
            <errordetail>
                <ContentID/>
                <code>/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION</code>
                <message>Resource not found for segment 'A_CustomerType'</message>
                <longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_CustomerType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
                <propertyref/>
                <severity>error</severity>
                <target/>
                <transition>false</transition>
            </errordetail>
        </errordetails>
    </innererror>
</error>

Could you kindly tell me how to solve the problem?

Is there a log on S4 Public where I can go to see these errors?

thanks in advance

Giuseppe
